meta.title: Why Throw Rockets Away When We Could Reuse Them? A SpaceX Story
meta.description:
What SpaceX did in under 4 years is amazing. Here's a simple story to help you understand how through persistence and learning from errors, they now do the "impossible."

Original Music by Everyday Astronaut (Tim Dodd) - https://soundcloud.com/everyday-astronaut-690255155/moon-dance

Book Everyday Astronaut for your school, company or event! - https://everydayastronaut.com/public-speaking

Footage by NASA, SpaceX and screenshots of Kerbal Space Program gameplay.
